SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--COMMUNITY RELATIONS--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
